response:
Emily started her week with 25 dogs at her [rescue center name] and received 4 new puppies on Thursday, bringing the total to 29 before the [arrival date] of the stray dog on Friday. After adding the single stray found by a family, the count reached 30 dogs, which is a significant number for the [staff member] to manage during the busy weekend at the [facility location].

On Saturday, the situation changed when 2 families each adopted 3 dogs, meaning a total of 6 dogs left the [adoption area] of the shelter. By subtracting these 6 adopted pets from the previous count of 30, Emily now has 24 dogs remaining in her care at the [contact phone number].
